title: Big Data Analytics
description: Introduction to big data processing frameworks and analytics techniques for large-scale datasets. Covers Hadoop ecosystem (HDFS, MapReduce, Hive), Apache Spark, stream processing (Kafka, Flink), data warehousing, and large-scale machine learning. Students work with real-world datasets and cloud-based big data platforms. CS305 is the prerequisite for machine learning foundations needed for large-scale analytics and distributed ML algorithms.
topics: Stream processing with Kafka and Flink
outcomes: Process large datasets using Hadoop and Spark
Design data pipelines for batch and stream processing
Apply machine learning at scale using distributed frameworks
Query large datasets using SparkSQL and Hive
